operations.summary: Retrieve existing connections, with extended resources information

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the application

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the connection

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Return results starting only from the specified index; 0-based index; default value = 0

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Return the specified number of results. Returns all results if no value specified

responseMessages.message: Start value cannot be a negative number.
Count value must be greater than 0.
No available licenses. Ask your SecureApp administrator for assistance.
Access is denied.
There is no application with the specified ID.
There are no connections with the name NAME.

operations.summary: Create a ticket to repair a connection

parameters.name: application_id
parameters.description: The application ID

parameters.name: connection_id
parameters.description: The connection ID

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Ticket

responseMessages.message: Ticket was created.
The requester must be the currently logged in user.
Workflow was not found.
Workflow is not active.
Workflow configuration is not valid.
Workflow is not set.
You cannot enter a status for a new ticket.
Requester cannot open a ticket in domain.
Invalid ticket priority.
Expiration field is required.
Submit ticket enabled only with the first step.
First step can be only with one task.
The specified workflow does not contain an access request field in the first step.
You cannot use an access request field to create a ticket from SecureApp.
The ticket fields do not match the fields in the current step of the workflow.
You cannot change the value of a field because it is read-only.
Logged in user: NAME do not have permission to perform on behalf actions.
You are not a participant in the first step of this workflow.
Access is denied.
To create a ticket you must purchase a valid SecureChange license.
No available licenses. Ask your SecureApp administrator for assistance.
You do not have permissions to edit this application.
Cannot create a ticket to repair this connection because the connection status is not disconnected.
Cannot create a ticket to repair this connection because the connection was edited but a ticket has not been created yet.
Cannot create a ticket to repair this connection because there are other open tickets for an application that includes this connection.
This application is publishing and therefore cannot be edited. Redo your changes after publishing is completed.
There is no application with the specified ID.
Connection with ID was not found for application with ID.
